Franklin County Housing — Statement of Interest
2,400 low-income tenants, six-county footprint, discriminatory eviction practices.
Disparate-impact theory: Section 3604(a) FHA + HUD 24 CFR 100.500.
Injunctive relief sought: pattern-and-practice injunction, restitution of fees, retention of jurisdiction.
Commonality: single eviction template applied uniformly.
Typicality: named plaintiffs' fact pattern representative.
Adequacy: Keystone qualified, no conflict of interest.
Cabrera v. HUD footnote 14 — the money footnote for our theory.
Second Circuit line: Inclusive Communities framework applies.
Statistical showing: 68% of impacted tenants from protected class.
Landlord will argue late-rent policy is neutral. Rebut with subgroup-level default rates.
Restitution: application fees, deposits held in escrow.
Compensatory: cost of relocation, storage, temporary housing.
Punitive: not sought — federal § 1988 attorney fees only.
Reyes v. Mountainview Properties — case notes
Retaliation claim: eviction notice within 14 days of habitability complaint.
Settlement posture: $85k plus fees, cleared by Sarah.
TRO covers utility shutoff and lockout. Effective through preliminary injunction hearing.
Client informed. Signal thread active for updates.
Franklin County Rural Justice Coalition — monthly
Rural outreach clinic — Malone 8/15, two attys + paralegal.
Eviction moratorium sunset guidance from AG — circulate to board.
CNY Winter Craft Fair 12/5 — table reserved.
Etsy inventory refresh — 8 new listings by end of August.
Semifinal scouting: East Syracuse Panthers collapse weak-side.
Sunday call with Grandma Ruth — noon.
Green Lakes long run — Saturday 6:30am with Jackie.
Read Wallace v. City of Rochester — same district.
Read Cabrera v. HUD — footnote 14 and following.
Read Inclusive Communities Project v. TDHCA — Supreme Court framework.
HUD OIG audits on rural housing subsidies.
Wendell Berry — What Are People For.
Central medallion: log cabin variant with red center.
Border: flying geese in muted reproduction cottons.
Ask about the feed sack blues — she saved them from the rummage.
